title: 七大道德原则 / Seven principles
point: 诚信、客观、胜任、公平、保密、专业、勤勉。 / Integrity, objectivity, competence, fairness, confidentiality, professionalism and diligence.
keyfacts: 守则规范成员行为与业务操守 / Codes govern members' behavior and conduct
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.16 — Ethical Behavior

title: 诚信=整全 / Integrity = whole
point: "integrity"源自整数(integer),意为完整、整全、未受减损;即言行一致、说到做到。 / 'Integrity' comes from 'integer' — being whole, entire and undiminished; doing what one says one will do.
keyfacts: 不止诚实,还含负责、公平、公正与道德勇气 / More than honesty: accountable, fair, impartial, moral courage
无论情境用同一套原则 / Same principles regardless of situation
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.16 — Principle of Integrity

title: 客观的两大障碍 / Obstacles to objectivity
point: 客观性的两大障碍是认知偏差与利益冲突。 / The two main obstacles to objectivity are cognitive bias and conflict of interest.
keyfacts: 最常见的认知偏差=确认偏差 / Most common cognitive bias = confirmation bias
纯粹客观是不可达的理想 / Pure objectivity is unachievable
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.16 — Principle of Objectivity

title: 胜任范围 / Sphere of competence
point: 只在胜任与专长范围内提供建议或销售产品,并有勇气坦承不懂、拒绝越界。 / Advise or sell only within one's sphere of competence, with the moral courage to admit what one does not know and refuse to act outside it.
keyfacts: 须完成规定 CPD 时数 / Must complete prescribed CPD hours
如寿险代理不应建议衍生品/双币产品 / E.g. a life agent should not advise on derivatives/dual-currency products
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.16 — Principle of Competence

title: 公平三概念 / Three concepts of fairness
point: 公平围绕平等、黄金法则、各得其所三个概念。 / Fairness revolves around equality, the Golden Rule, and giving each person what is due.
keyfacts: 平等="相似之事相似处理",差别须有正当理由 / Equality = treat like things alike; differences must be justified
黄金法则=己所欲施于人 / Golden Rule = do unto others
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.16 — Principle of Fairness

title: 利益相关者 / Stakeholders
point: 金融机构传统利益相关者:股东、服务提供者、雇员、代理与代表、供应商、社区、监管者与政府。 / Traditional stakeholders: shareholders, service providers, employees, agents/representatives, suppliers, community, regulators and government.
keyfacts: 尊重利益相关者利益亦符合自身利益 / Respecting stakeholders' interests serves one's self-interest
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.16 — Principle of Fairness

title: PDPA 罚则 / PDPA penalties
point: 个人违反 PDPA 罚款≤S$5,000 及/或监禁≤2 年;公司罚款 S$100 万或年营业额 10%,取较高者。 / Individual breach: fine ≤ S$5,000 and/or jail ≤ 2 yrs; company: S$1 million or 10% of annual turnover, whichever greater.
keyfacts: 个人数据=可识别个人身份的数据(无论真假) / Personal data = data identifying an individual, true or not
另有声誉损害与银行保密法等制裁 / Also reputational damage and banking-secrecy sanctions
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.16 — Principle of Confidentiality (PDPA 2012)

title: 专业两要求 / Two requirements of professionalism
point: 以尊重对待所有人、不视为"纯粹手段";并以带来信任与尊严的方式行事,保持端正与正直。 / Treat all persons with respect, not as 'mere means'; act so as to bring trust and dignity to the profession with propriety and probity.
keyfacts: 行业依赖公众信心与信任 / The industry depends on public confidence and trust
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.16 — Principle of Professionalism

title: 勤勉三要素 / Three components of diligence
point: 及时周全地提供服务、以应有审慎(due care)行事、确保支持人员亦专业。 / Provide services promptly and thoroughly, with due care, and ensure support staff also act professionally.
keyfacts: due care="painstaking"般细致 / Due care = a 'painstaking' manner
勿过度承诺、交付不足 / Do not over-promise and under-deliver
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.16 — Principle of Diligence

title: 道德的益处 / Benefits of ethics
point: 建立客户忠诚、提升声誉、留住好员工、营造正向环境、避免法律问题——"好道德就是好生意"。 / Build client loyalty, enhance reputation, retain good employees, create a positive environment, avoid legal problems — 'good ethics is good business'.
keyfacts: 行业基于信任,产品无形 / The industry is based on trust; products are intangible
服务现有客户比开发新客户成本更低 / Serving existing clients costs less than prospecting
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.16 — Benefits of Ethical Behavior

title: 确认偏差 / Confirmation bias
point: 确认偏差是只寻找并解读支持既有假设或理论的信息的认知偏差。 / Confirmation bias is looking for and interpreting information that supports an assumption or theory one already holds.
keyfacts: 认知偏差是对现实的主观建构 / Cognitive bias is a subjective construction of reality
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.16 — Principle of Objectivity (Cognitive Bias)

title: LIA 与 IMAS 守则 / LIA and IMAS codes
point: LIA 核心价值含专业、道德、公平、公开诚实、主动;IMAS 要求诚信专业、胜任并提升、应有勤勉与专业判断。 / LIA values include professional, ethical, fair, open & honest, proactive; IMAS requires integrity/professionalism, competence and its improvement, and due diligence with professional judgment.
keyfacts: 守则用于规范并指引成员业务操守 / Codes govern and guide members' conduct
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.16 — Codes of Ethics and Standards
